line_style: 无线条,暗调摄影,高对比阴影
render: 暗调摄影+哥特后期,dark moody processing
lighting: 单点光源+深阴影,极高对比chiaroscuro
prompt_keywords: Dark gothic portrait photography, extreme low-key lighting, deep shadows, mysterious atmosphere, chiaroscuro effect, moody processing, somber tones
negative_keywords: bright, cheerful, pastel, sunny, fashion, glamour, cartoon, anime, cyberpunk, neon
scene_blacklist: 古宅雨夜(除非故事明确)

fp_examples.action: 人物在烛光中独坐,半张脸隐入暗影
人物在暗影走廊中行走,脚步声回荡
人物在破碎镜前与自己的镜像对峙
人物缓缓融入暗影,只剩轮廓

prompt_example: A figure sits alone in a candlelit chamber, half their face swallowed by deep shadow, extreme low-key lighting with single source illumination, mysterious gothic atmosphere, chiaroscuro effect, moody dark processing --ar 2:3 --s 750 --style raw --no text
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 暗黑肖像·哥特人像
✅ 允许场景: 烛光密室/暗影走廊/废弃教堂/地下墓室 (从故事原文提取)
❌ 禁止场景: 明亮场景/现代都市/自然田园/赛博朋克
❌ 禁止照抄: 不要用'古宅雨夜'(除非故事明确),必须用暗黑哥特场景
氛围: 哥特神秘,暗调高对比
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Extract scenes from the story content. Use dark gothic scenes (candlelit rooms, shadowy corridors). Do NOT use bright scenes, modern cities, or default 'ancient mansion'. Emphasize extreme low-key lighting and chiaroscuro.
meta_prompt: Dark gothic portrait photography, extreme low-key lighting, deep shadows, mysterious atmosphere, chiaroscuro effect, moody processing, somber tones

cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 进阶肖像解读, 需审美判断力

reader_constraint.reader_state: 鉴赏者·期待深邃人性表达
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 明暗对比+面部细节+情绪张力

visual_frequency.HF: 面部高光区/眼神光/皮肤纹理(高频凝视焦点)
visual_frequency.MF: 服饰褶皱/手部姿态/肩颈线条(中频人物叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 背景暗部/环境虚化/阴影渐变(低频氛围)
visual_frequency.progression: HF锁定面部三角区, MF延伸至肢体语言, LF吞噬背景留想象
